name: AlanClaw Electrical PV Systems
content:
Use AlanClaw Electrical + PV Systems and reference #AlanClaw Electrical PV Systems when relevant.

First classify the request:
- Electrical design/construction
- PV system design/construction
- Combined electrical + PV grid-tie workflow

Please produce:
1. Scope summary
2. Available inputs and missing inputs
3. Preliminary electrical design checklist
4. Preliminary PV design checklist, if relevant
5. BOQ pre-check table
6. Construction sequence and inspection checklist
7. Questions for designer, electrician, PV installer, utility, site team, or client
8. Confirmation message for the relevant team

Safety boundary:
All load calculations, cable sizes, breaker/fuse/RCD/RCBO/SPD/isolator ratings, panel schedules, grounding, bonding, lightning protection, PV string sizing, inverter capacity, generation estimates, grid connection, battery storage, BOQ quantities, prices, and construction safety conclusions must be marked "requires human confirmation".

User input:
{{input}}
